# Changelog

  * Fixed `cd <outside-dir>` permission prompt

</Update>

<Update label="2.1.83" description="March 25, 2026">
  * Added managed-settings.d/ drop-in directory
  * Fixed mouse tracking escape sequences
</Update>

<Update label="2.1.82" description="March 24, 2026">
  * Added new feature
